'''鈭歜-j-ng-k''' ('''kabajngekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dwarfen|dwarfen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-j-ng-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dwarfen|dwarfen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-j-ng-k
|-
! Lemma
| kabajngekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibajngekoko|thibajngekoko]] || [[word:jibajngekoko|jibajngekoko]] || [[word:shibajngekoko|shibajngekoko]] || [[word:kibajngekoko|kibajngekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubajngekoko|thuthubajngekoko]] || [[word:jujubajngekoko|jujubajngekoko]] || [[word:shushubajngekoko|shushubajngekoko]] || [[word:kukubajngekoko|kukubajngekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shabajngekithi|shabajngekithi]] || [[word:shabajngekiji|shabajngekiji]] || [[word:shabajngekishi|shabajngekishi]] || [[word:shabajngekiki|shabajngekiki]]
